name: 灵气
//: 灵气：本 mod 的独立修炼能量池，与 mana/智力解耦。/ Qi: the mod's standalone cultivation energy pool, decoupled from mana/INT.
//max: 静态 max 仅作防溢出兜底（远高于化神满级理论值）；当前生效上限由境界 spell level 经 math 表达式动态计算，并由 qi_clamp EOC 钳制。详见 doc/03_qi_system.md。/ Static max is only an overflow safety net; the effective cap is computed dynamically from realm spell levels and clamped by the qi_clamp EOC.
//rate: 被动回复设为 0；灵气恢复走主动吐纳打坐（activity + EOC），不做被动代谢。/ No passive regen; qi is restored via active meditation, not metabolism.
